input.command: python3 -c "import numpy as np; print(np.__version__)"; gcc --version | head -1

cd /app; cat > /tmp/a.py <<'EOF'
import numpy as np
f=np.memmap('gpt2-124M.ckpt',dtype='<f4',mode='r')
print("total",f.size)
V,C=50257,768; L=12
def stat(a): return f"n={a.size} mean={a.mean():.4f} std={a.std():.4f} min={a.min():.3f} max={a.max():.3f}"
# natural order hypothesis
off=0
def take(n):
    global off
    a=f[off:off+n]; off+=n; return a
wte=take(V*C); print("wte",stat(wte))
wpe=take(1024*C); print("wpe",stat(wpe))
for li in range(1):
    print("--layer",li)
    print(" ln1g",stat(take(C)))
    print(" ln1b",stat(take(C)))
    print(" attnw",stat(take(C*3*C)))
    print(" attnb",stat(take(3*C)))
    print(" projw",stat(take(C*C)))
    print(" projb",stat(take(C)))
    print(" ln2g",stat(take(C)))
    print(" ln2b",stat(take(C)))
    print(" fcw",stat(take(C*4*C)))
    print(" fcb",stat(take(4*C)))
    print(" mprojw",stat(take(4*C*C)))
    print(" mprojb",stat(take(C)))
EOF
python3 /tmp/a.py

input.command:
cd /app; cat > /tmp/ref2.py <<'EOF'
import numpy as np, sys, re
exec(open('/tmp/tok.py').read())
V,C,L,H=50257,768,12,12
# build name->shape
specs={'model/wte':(V,C),'model/wpe':(1024,C),'model/ln_f/g':(C,),'model/ln_f/b':(C,)}
for h in range(L):
    p=f'model/h{h}/'
    specs[p+'ln_1/g']=(C,); specs[p+'ln_1/b']=(C,)
    specs[p+'attn/c_attn/w']=(1,C,3*C); specs[p+'attn/c_attn/b']=(3*C,)
    specs[p+'attn/c_proj/w']=(1,C,C); specs[p+'attn/c_proj/b']=(C,)
    specs[p+'ln_2/g']=(C,); specs[p+'ln_2/b']=(C,)
    specs[p+'mlp/c_fc/w']=(1,C,4*C); specs[p+'mlp/c_fc/b']=(4*C,)
    specs[p+'mlp/c_proj/w']=(1,4*C,C); specs[p+'mlp/c_proj/b']=(C,)
names=sorted(specs)
f=np.memmap('gpt2-124M.ckpt',dtype='<f4',mode='r')
off=0; W={}
for nm in names:
    sh=specs[nm]; n=int(np.prod(sh))
    W[nm]=np.array(f[off:off+n]).reshape(sh); off+=n
print("consumed",off,"of",f.size)
wte=W['model/wte']; wpe=W['model/wpe']; lnfg=W['model/ln_f/g']; lnfb=W['model/ln_f/b']
def ln(x,g,b):
    m=x.mean(-1,keepdims=True); v=x.var(-1,keepdims=True)
    return (x-m)/np.sqrt(v+1e-5)*g+b
def gelu(x): return 0.5*x*(1+np.tanh(np.sqrt(2/np.pi)*(x+0.044715*x**3)))
def softmax(x):
    x=x-x.max(-1,keepdims=True); e=np.exp(x); return e/e.sum(-1,keepdims=True)
def forward(ids):
    x=wte[ids]+wpe[:len(ids)]; n=len(ids)
    for h in range(L):
        p=f'model/h{h}/'
        hh=ln(x,W[p+'ln_1/g'],W[p+'ln_1/b'])
        qkv=hh@W[p+'attn/c_attn/w'][0]+W[p+'attn/c_attn/b']
        q,k,v=np.split(qkv,3,axis=-1); hs=C//H
        def sh(t): return t.reshape(n,H,hs).transpose(1,0,2)
        q,k,v=sh(q),sh(k),sh(v)
        att=q@k.transpose(0,2,1)/np.sqrt(hs)
        att=softmax(att+np.triu(np.ones((n,n))*-1e10,1))
        o=(att@v).transpose(1,0,2).reshape(n,C)
        x=x+o@W[p+'attn/c_proj/w'][0]+W[p+'attn/c_proj/b']
        hh=ln(x,W[p+'ln_2/g'],W[p+'ln_2/b'])
        x=x+gelu(hh@W[p+'mlp/c_fc/w'][0]+W[p+'mlp/c_fc/b'])@W[p+'mlp/c_proj/w'][0]+W[p+'mlp/c_proj/b']
    return ln(x,lnfg,lnfb)@wte.T
ids=encode(sys.argv[1])
for _ in range(20):
    ids.append(int(forward(ids)[-1].argmax()))
print("OUT:",repr(decode(ids)))
EOF
# extract tokenizer part into /tmp/tok.py
sed -n '/def bytes_to_unicode/,/^def decode/p' /tmp/ref.py > /tmp/tok.py
# also need the decode body: grab through the decode function end
python3 - <<'PY'
src=open('/tmp/ref.py').read()
a=src.index('def bytes_to_unicode')
b=src.index('# ---- weights')
open('/tmp/tok.py','w').write(src[a:b])
PY
python3 /tmp/ref2.py "Alan Turing theorized that computers would one day become" 2>&1 | tail -5
